payload:
GPU macro experiments on RunPod. SSH: 'ssh runpod'. 8-HOUR BUDGET.                                                                                                        
  CONTEXT: All-modules LoRA locked. Answer-conditioned PPL proven (r=0.811). Architecture is SOLE (Structurally Orthogonal Latent Experts).                                                  
  RULE: NEVER poll/sleep/wait. Start nohup background jobs, move on. Each task <2hrs active time.                                          ... [truncated, 3437 chars total]

GPU_BLOCKED: pilot50_benchmark running (PID 71406, ~50 domains), gpu_latency_bench queued (PID 71932, chained). Both nohup. Next iteration: check results JSONs, update PAPER.md, mark proven/killed in HYPOTHESES.yml. Scripts deployed: scripts/gpu_latency_bench.py. Docs written: micro/models/inference_latency_gpu/{MATH,PAPER}.md. Budget: ~/bin/zsh.14 this session.

exp_distillation_pilot_50 PROVEN: 98% win rate (49/50), 42.2% avg PPL improvement, /bin/zsh.44/expert. Only SQL regressed (-21.4%). Qwen2.5-7B + Llama 3.3 70B teacher. GPU latency bench restarted (bug fix), running as nohup on RunPod.

exp_distillation_pilot_50: REVISE. Fix 1: train/eval contamination (eval examples are in training set, ~2.4 epochs). Fix 2: downgrade proven→supported until MMLU/HumanEval kill criteria tested. Fix 3: add explicit contamination caveat to PAPER.md results section.

exp_distillation_pilot_50 REVISED: (1) contamination caveat added to PAPER.md results, (2) status downgraded proven→supported in HYPOTHESES.yml pending MMLU/HumanEval, (3) limitations section updated for clarity. Propagated to FINDINGS.md and VISION.md. No re-runs needed.

exp_distillation_pilot_50 PROCEED (re-review). Status: supported (contaminated eval). 2 new nodes: exp_pilot50_held_out_eval (P7), exp_pilot50_composition_quality (P5). Next: held-out MMLU/HumanEval to upgrade to proven.

exp_gpu_latency_validation PROVEN: pre-merge max +3.3% (threshold 5%), dynamic slope -0.61%/expert (N-independent). K3 deferred (no vLLM). exp_relora_composition_macro ACTIVE: prep done, training nohup on RunPod (~60-90min). Check: ssh runpod 'tail -30 /workspace/relora_macro.log'
